channel.title: +Filter on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Filter on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Portable
item.description: .1 micron Sawyer Squeeze system USA made. 540 gallons of clean water per day. Life Expectancy: 1 Million Gallons Can attach to faucet with Faucet adapter. 32-ounce BPA-free collapsible pouches that roll up tightly - can be resued hundreds of times .01 micron Beaker system Brita 2.0L filtered water Maxtra filters are not pore-based. They just reduce heavy metals. 2 tank system Kent Gold Optima Plastic tank Sediment filter UF filter 4k liters UF membrane life.
